sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_b360cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c83
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Change Request Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_change_request");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=20)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" changes",finding:c+" OT change requests found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" changes",finding:c+" OT change requests found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 changes",finding:"No OT change requests found."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT change request volume reflects the frequency of operational technology changes that benefit from AI-assisted risk assessment and approval workflows. Now Assist can analyze change descriptions and flag potential OT system impacts.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure OT change requests are being managed through the OTSM module.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Site Records Configured","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_site");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=5)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" sites",finding:c+" site records found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" sites",finding:c+" site record(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 sites",finding:"No site records found. Site context improves AI impact analysis."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT site records provide the physical and logical context for AI-assisted incident triage and asset management. Without site configuration, Now Assist cannot accurately scope recommendations to specific OT environments or facilities.","remediation_guidance":"Populate site records in the CMDB and associate them with OT assets.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"Now Assist for OT Security Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_otsm_gen_ai");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist for OT Security is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist for OT Security (sn_otsm_gen_ai) is not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for OT Security enables AI-powered alert triage, incident summarization, and threat analysis for operational technology environments. Without this plugin, OT security teams cannot leverage generative AI to accelerate response to OT-specific threats.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist for OT Security from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Asset (cmdb_ci_ot) Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_ot");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" OT assets",finding:c+" OT assets found in CMDB."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" OT assets",finding:c+" OT assets in CMDB."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 OT assets",finding:"No OT assets found in CMDB."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT asset (CMDB CI) volume reflects the scope of the OT environment under management. Comprehensive OT asset coverage enables Now Assist to provide contextually accurate recommendations by correlating incidents and changes with affected OT systems.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure OT assets are discovered and catalogued in the CMDB using OT-specific discovery tools.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Assignment Groups Configured","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_user_group");
ga.addQuery("name","CONTAINS","OT");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=2)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" groups",finding:c+" OT assignment groups found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" group",finding:c+" OT group found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 groups",finding:"No OT assignment groups found."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT assignment groups ensure AI Agent task routing and Now Assist escalations reach the correct OT security and operations teams. Without properly configured groups, automated assignments from AI-generated actions will fail.","remediation_guidance":"Configure OT security assignment groups by zone or facility.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Incident Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_incident");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" incidents",finding:c+" OT incidents found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" incidents",finding:c+" OT incidents found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 incidents",finding:"No OT incidents found."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT incident volume determines the scale of benefit from Now Assist incident summarization and AI-assisted resolution. Higher OT incident volumes mean greater time savings for security analysts triaging and resolving OT-specific threats.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure OT security incidents are being logged in the OTSM module.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Entity Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ot_entity");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" OT entities",finding:c+" OT entities found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" OT entities",finding:c+" OT entities found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 entities",finding:"No OT entities found in CMDB."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT entity records represent the operational technology components that AI can analyze for vulnerability patterns and security posture. Adequate entity volume enables Now Assist to surface risk insights across the OT environment.","remediation_guidance":"Populate OT entities in the CMDB to enable AI-driven impact analysis.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Knowledge Base Articles","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("kb_knowledge");
ga.addQuery("workflow_state","published");
ga.addQuery("short_description","CONTAINS","OT");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=5)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" articles",finding:c+" OT KB articles found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" articles",finding:c+" OT KB articles found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 articles",finding:"No OT KB articles found."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT knowledge base articles provide the domain-specific content that Now Assist uses to generate accurate recommendations for OT security scenarios. Without sufficient OT knowledge content, AI search and response quality will be degraded.","remediation_guidance":"Create KB articles covering OT security procedures, asset handling, and incident response.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT Incident Resolution Notes Quality","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_incident");
ga.addQuery("close_notes","!=","");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var withNotes=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
var ga2=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_incident");
ga2.addAggregate("COUNT");ga2.query();
var total=ga2.next()?parseInt(ga2.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
var pct=total>0?Math.round(withNotes/total*100):0;
if(pct>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:withNotes+"/"+total+" ("+pct+"%) with notes",finding:pct+"% of OT incidents have close notes."};
if(withNotes>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:withNotes+"/"+total+" ("+pct+"%) with notes",finding:"Only "+pct+"% of OT incidents have close notes."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0/"+total+" with notes",finding:"No OT incidents have close notes. AI summarization will be limited."};
})()","ai_justification":"Resolution notes quality on OT incidents directly impacts Now Assist summarization accuracy and AI Agent learning. Well-documented resolutions enable AI to generate better recommendations and accelerate future incident resolution.","remediation_guidance":"Train OT teams to populate close notes on resolved incidents to improve AI summarization quality.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"OTSM","check_name":"OT CI Relationships Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_rel_ci");
ga.addQuery("parent.sys_class_name","cmdb_ci_ot");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" relationships",finding:c+" OT CI relationships found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" relationships",finding:c+" OT CI relationships found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 relationships",finding:"No OT CI relationships found."};
})()","ai_justification":"OT CI relationship volume reflects the fidelity of the OT topology model. Rich relationship data enables Now Assist to perform impact analysis and allows AI Agents to understand blast radius when assessing OT security incidents.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure OT CI relationships are mapped in the CMDB.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:44</sys_created_on><sys_id>b360cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c83</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_OTSM</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_b360cea2cf594f148935fb251d851c83</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
